BINDER, STACI THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: PREVIOUSLY ENTERED ON MAR. 10,1993 $366.35 RENT, $120.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $686.35, LEASE FORFEITED
